subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enkindled with the fire of guidance! Through the wilderness of deprivation thou hast journeyed, and to the abode of certitude and the Ka'bih of understanding thou hast attained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتعل بنار هدی بادیه حرمان پیمودی و بسر منزل ایقان و کعبه عرفان رسیدی از
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual transformation
